name: Slime Laboratory 3
author: Poki
description: The escaping slime is back in Slime Laboratory 3! In this third instalment, your slimy adventure continue on an ice planet, introducing a frosty twist to the physics-based platforming fun. Embark on a slippery journey filled with icy challenges and tricky traps. Don't forget to collect every disk along the way! Are you prepared to tackle this frosty challenge? How to play Slime Laboratory 3? Move - Left/Right arrows Jump - Upward arrow Down - Downward arrow Who created Slime Laboratory 3? Slime Laboratory 3 was created by Neutronized. Play their other classic and flash games on Poki: Slime Laboratory , Slime Laboratory 2 , Double Panda , Magic Bridge , lost-yeti, Shovel Pirate and Slime Pizza How can I play Slime Laboratory 3 for free? You can play Slime Laboratory 3 for free on Poki. Can I play Slime Laboratory 3 on mobile devices and desktop? Slime Laboratory 3 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
